executive_summary: Analyzed 697 articles (582 competitor, 115 internal). See differentiators and reader advantages sections for detailed topic analysis.

market_pulse.narrative: Multiple jurisdictions are tightening gambling regulations, from EU tax proposals to national compliance reviews and problem‑gambling legislation, signalling heightened regulatory risk for operators.

market_pulse.theme: Prediction markets legal and market impact
market_pulse.narrative: Prediction markets are emerging as a growth area but face legal challenges and regulatory battles, with operators and regulators debating their future role in iGaming.
High‑profile merger talks and acquisition bids indicate a consolidating market, with major players like Bally’s, Evoke, MGM and Caesars in focus.
The African gaming sector is attracting new technology partners, regulatory summits and cross‑border initiatives, highlighting a fast‑growing regional market.
Competitors are emphasizing the cost of poor affiliate tracking and the role of AI in building trust, pointing to a need for better data‑driven affiliate management.

strategic_gaps.description: Competitors are reporting on new tax proposals, compliance reviews, and problem‑gambling legislation that we have not covered.
strategic_gaps.competitor_coverage: EU online gambling tax proposal, Swedish regulator checks on bet365, LeoVegas, Unibet, Spelinspektionen compliance review, Tierra del Fuego problem gambling bill, MGA alerts ahead of World Cup.

portfolio_wins.topic: Law enforcement actions against illegal gambling
portfolio_wins.our_narrative: Our portfolio provides on‑the‑ground reporting of enforcement activity, exemplified by coverage of a raid resulting in arrests, demonstrating credibility in investigative journalism.
Our internal article provides early, detailed knowledge of Austria’s upcoming market liberalisation, positioning us as a go‑to source for European regulatory intelligence.
Coverage of StatsDrone securing over $1 million in funding highlights our awareness of emerging data‑analytics players that could become strategic partners for operators.
Our portfolio provides timely analysis of the high‑profile Tilman Fertitta acquisition of Caesars, demonstrating leadership in reporting on landmark industry transactions.

portfolio_wins.topic: US market guidance for European affiliates
portfolio_wins.our_narrative: Our portfolio provides a focused analysis of the US market specifically for European affiliates, offering actionable insights that complement broader US regulatory news.
